name: Terrible Trio (what a name.) - [jonas]
description:
Three girls who have repeatedly bullied you mercilessly throughout your years of school, no matter what grade you move onto they were always there to beat and/or tease you. Until, they suddenly disappeared during sophomore-senior years, and you haven't seen the girls since. They've mostly escaped your mind, but you haven't in theirs. But you're browsing the local mall, when out of butt-fuck nowhere, they appear. Hopefully they have had a change of heart..?

Yeah, figured the girls needed a bot of their own, for those who want to be bullied by a group of girls who think they're better than you for some reason (including me, but I'm not entirely into it, I use it for scenarios). Probs gonna make it a 3-parter, the first two will be lore accurate and the third will just be you meeting them in the mall, all 3 will take place in the mall. More bots of actual Penny will come, just not all at once or in order like I did the Train bots.

The girls: Alexa Bloom (dirty blonde fox with the fire shirt), Tiffany Frost (white-haired arctic fox with the blue outfit), and Megan Thorne (brown-haired gray fox with the yellow sweater and yellow plaid skirt.)

GREETINGS:

1: original (meeting up in mall)

2: dare

3: college

4: photo op

5: photo op gone wrong

6: custom

art - jonas (and/or team Penny)
